LightningComponentBundle.description: Interactive word cloud and bar chart visualization with hover effects for text analysis from CRM Analytics

property.name: chartType
property.label: Chart Type
property.description: Chart type (live): wordCloud, h-wordCloud, v-wordCloud, m-wordCloud, v-BarChart, h-BarChart. Change applies immediately.

property.name: sizeMode
property.label: Size Mode
property.description: Dynamic: chart resizes with the widget. Fixed: use Canvas Width/Height below.

property.name: svgWidth
property.label: Canvas Width
property.description: Width in pixels (used when Size Mode is Fixed)

property.name: svgHeight
property.label: Canvas Height
property.description: Height in pixels (used when Size Mode is Fixed)

property.name: maxWords
property.label: Maximum Words
property.description: Maximum number of words to display (word clouds: 50 recommended; bar charts show top 20)

property.name: minWordLength
property.label: Minimum Word Length
property.description: Minimum character length for words to be included

property.name: textColumnName
property.label: Text Column Name
property.description: Column containing text data to analyze

property.name: showLegend
property.label: Show Legend
property.description: Display the legend with word statistics

property.name: theme
property.label: Theme
property.description: Choose light or night theme for the chart background and chrome.

property.name: chartTitleOverride
property.label: Custom Title
property.description: Optional custom chart title. If left blank, a default title is chosen based on the chart type.
